creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
I successfully downgraded poudriere to "poudriere-git-3.4.99.20240708" but I am still getting the same error.

[00:00:24] Error: /usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh:download_from_repo_post_delete:20:download_from_repo_post_delete: We lost fetched unversioned gdk-pixbuf2-2.42.10_3.pkg
Error: (92893) /usr/local/share/poudriere/bulk.sh:download_from_repo_post_delete:257: set -e error: status = 70
